_description: Quantization-confound check: the identical consolidation ablations re-run on the UN-QUANTIZED bf16 base model (CohereLabs/command-a-plus-05-2026), to test whether the W4A4 negative finding is a 4-bit artifact. It is not — the verdict reproduces. Compare against consolidation_verdict.json (W4A4).
masking_note: Under TP=8 the model forward runs in 8 worker processes; the ablation mask is installed in each worker via vLLM collective_rpc (a driver-only monkeypatch is a silent no-op under tensor parallelism). Smoke gate verified: per-worker mask_calls=256, Arabic noop->masked NLL delta=1.81.
metric: per-item NLL increase (nats/token), independent Wikipedia corpus + solution-NLL; bootstrap 95% CIs; same rules as the W4A4 run

ar.note: MODULAR in both precisions; effect within 0.01 of W4A4

es.note: knife-edge: point-rule selectivity flips to FAIL by 0.015 (W4A4 passed by 0.002) -> sits exactly on the boundary

general.note: does not beat null in both

summary.conclusion: The negative finding (only Arabic robustly modular; modularity mostly dissolves) reproduces at full precision. It is a property of the model, not a quantization artifact. The only family to move across precisions is the knife-edge es, which flips point-rule selectivity by a hair — reinforcing the measurement-fragility thesis.
